author: vadim borisov (tabularis.ai)
name: Int6 MLP3x + OrthoInit + SmearGate + BigramHash + SlidingWindow
blurb: Six stacked improvements: (1) int6 per-row quant on MLP+attention with zstd-22, fp16 tied embedding + last-2-layer K passthrough. (2) 3x MLP expansion. (3) Tuned optimizer: matrix_lr=0.02, Muon momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000, grad clip 0.3. (4) Orthogonal + muP-scaled weight init (output projections scaled by 1/sqrt(2*num_layers)). (5) SmearGate + Bigram hash embedding. (6) Sliding window eval stride=64.
